commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=38905bf983280914eccce75c585a44247513a2e1)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a non-fatal cron preflight diagnostic when an agent-turn cron payload allows `web_search` but no managed web search provider plugin is enabled.

PR surface: Source +53. Total +53 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: the linked issue gives a concrete cron `toolsAllow: ["web_search"]` setup with disabled managed providers, and current main has no preflight diagnostic for that mismatch. I did not run a live cron job in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human or contributor follow-up is needed because the PR has a correctness blocker plus missing contributor-owned real behavior proof, so ClawSweeper repair should not be requested from this review.

target.title: fix(cron): warn when toolsAllow includes web_search but no search provider is enabled
target.author: alix-007

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
